title: AP-State GST Registration Certificate — Mandatory at Bid Stage
text_english: The bidder SHALL FURNISH the GST REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE issued by the GOVERNMENT OF ANDHRA PRADESH along with the tender. Out-of-state GSTINs are PERMITTED only where the bidder undertakes to obtain an AP GSTIN within {{ap_gstin_obtain_days}} (default 30) days of contract award. Bidder's AP GSTIN: {{ap_gstin}}; valid until: {{ap_gstin_validity}}.

parameters.name: ap_gstin_obtain_days
parameters.label: Days to Obtain AP GSTIN Post-Award
